reason: Verified that the QA-20260502-180142-fek5 agent successfully receives and responds to a simple math question with the correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar displaying three agents including QA-20260502-180142-fek5.
Clicked on "QA-20260502-180142-fek5" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened successfully.
Verified agent status — Agent status was "idle" (meets requirement for running or idle).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input — Message successfully entered in the textbox.
Clicked send button — Message submitted successfully and agent transitioned to "working" status.
Waited for response with timeout of 180 seconds — Response received within approximately 2 seconds, showing the agent worked for 2s.

Verified response contains "4" and captured screenshot — Response correctly shows "4" as the answer to the math question. Screenshot taken successfully showing the full conversation with the correct response visible.
